prompt: A red sneaker transformed into a rocket blasting through space
prompt_refined: Generate an artwork transforming image 1, a red sneaker, into a rocket. The rocket-sneaker should be dynamically blasting upwards through the center of a cosmic deep space background, emitting powerful, fiery exhaust flames from its heel. The scene should convey a sense of rapid motion and adventure.
objects: Red rocket-sneaker (blasting upwards through the center)
Fiery exhaust flames (emitting from its heel)
